basic_details.short_information: Utkal University Recruitment 2026 short notice released for Faculty. Apply online from May 15 to June 16 2026 at the official Utkal University careers portal.

how_to_apply: The application process is entirely online through the HIMS portal: https://hims.odisha.gov.in/home
After online submission, a hard copy along with all relevant documents must be sent to the Registrar, Utkal University, Vani Vihar, Bhubaneswar-751004, Odisha
seo_tags: Utkal University Faculty Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, Professor Posts
